name: Leveling
short: MEE6-style leveling with XP, role rewards and a leaderboard.
description: Award XP for messages and voice activity, with a MEE6-style level curve, level-up announcements, role rewards (stack or replace), no-XP channels/roles, rank cards and a paginated leaderboard. Opt-in per guild, bilingual (DE/EN), with web dashboard integration.
author: Domekologe
install_msg:
Thanks for installing Leveling!

Load it with `[p]load leveling`, enable it with `[p]levelset enable true`, then configure it via its commands or the PDC web dashboard (if installed).
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores, per server, each member's accumulated XP and current level, keyed by their Discord user ID, plus server configuration. This data can be deleted on request.
